title: Unit Talk V2 — Operator Authority Matrix
gap_closed: Gap #22 — service_role unrestricted; separation of duties was convention only

roles.name: Pick Submitter
roles.notes: Submits picks via API or smart-form. Cannot settle, post, or grade.

roles.name: Pick Settler
roles.notes: Records settlement outcomes and corrections. Cannot submit new picks or post to delivery targets.

roles.name: Pick Poster
roles.notes: Enqueues picks to outbox for delivery. Cannot settle or override decisions.

roles.name: Outbox Worker
roles.notes: Processes outbox delivery. Cannot modify pick lifecycle or settlement state.

roles.name: Operator
roles.notes: Administrative operator. Can override decisions and manage members. Cannot submit picks directly.

roles.name: Capper
roles.notes: Authenticated via JWT. Same submission authority as submitter but identity-bound via capperId claim.

separation_of_duties.principle: No role may act outside its declared domain set. Cross-domain actions require cross_domain_allowed=true.
separation_of_duties.enforcement: assertAuthority() in packages/contracts/src/operator-role.ts throws AuthorityViolationError on violation.
separation_of_duties.audit: All authority violations are logged with roleId and domain for replay-safe audit trail.

adversarial_validation.scenario: A 'settler' role attempts a 'picks:post' domain action — rejected with AUTHORITY_VIOLATION.
